scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w @po/api" "npm run dev -w @po/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @po/shared && npm run build -w @po/web && npm run build -w @po/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @po/shared && npm run typecheck -w @po/api && npm run typecheck -w @po/web
scripts.test: npm run build -w @po/shared && npm run test -w @po/api
